conflict: Publishing Ferrand's payments and the dead comrades' real histories will not resurrect anyone and may endanger the survivors who escaped.
consequence: Elise leaks the evidence to sympathetic and mainstream papers, pays one final month of her mother's care with the money she has left, and disappears from Paris under no usable name.
must_land_beats: News of Lucien's death must feel like institutional waste rather than melodramatic martyrdom.
The leak should stain the official case without pretending truth automatically wins.
Elise's departure from Paris should register as exile, not liberation.
objective: Decide what to do with the truth after Lucien dies in custody before his case can be meaningfully heard.
